title: cerinthodes oblongifolium
intro: Cerinthodes oblongifolium, also known as the "Chinese coleus", is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cerinthodes oblongifolium include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
